![](https://img03.en25.com/EloquaImages/clients/FCBusinessIntelligenceLtd/%7Beec341f7-a3c1-4632-94f7-f8727c829fa8%7D_5498--REF--LegalLeadersEurope2022--1080px.jpg)

**From company lawyer to strategic business adviser - Europe’s leading in-house counsel unite in London to accelerate beyond law**

**Accelerate beyond law**

Legal was once an isolated department only responsible for providing legal advice and overseeing compliance, ethics, and outside counsel relationships. It gained the undesirable reputation of a conservative and reactive cost centre which hindered innovation and stifled growth.

But no longer.

The unparalleled volatility of recent times has thrust legal and the role of the GC into the spotlight. Global economic crises, a rapidly evolving regulatory landscape, and an increased focus on corporate governance has forced the legal department and its leaders to evolve beyond law.

Today’s legal leaders must anticipate threats and collaborate across disparate business teams to shape the strategic direction of their organisations and mitigate risk as their remit expands to corporate affairs, information security and enterprise risk management.

New responsibilities require new skills and new mindsets. Whilst a solid legal education will always be a necessary foundation, legal leaders must also develop robust business expertise, cultivate a deep understanding of their organisations, and show deft leadership to become the enabling and strategic function their businesses desperately need.

Reluctantly accepting legal to be a risk averse hinderance is longer an option.

Join 200+ General Counsel and Chief Legal Officers from Europe’s largest organisations at Reuters Events: Legal Leaders Europe 2022 to elevate your role beyond law and operate as a successful, efficient, and trusted strategic business adviser.

![](https://img03.en25.com/EloquaImages/clients/FCBusinessIntelligenceLtd/%7B3a85844f-853d-4c19-9cbe-0401cd9849e5%7D_5498-10NOV22-Ticketsremaining_.png)

**5 reasons Legal Leaders Europe 2022 is a must-attend:**

- Connect in-person with Europe’s biggest and brightest GCs and CLOs to supercharge your legal, ethical and business expertise
- Uncover nuanced insights on key areas transforming European in-house law including sanctions, Brexit and legal tech
- Hear from the continent’s leading law firms and newest innovative legal tech to do more with less
- Identify practical solutions to every-day legal and business challenges with masterclasses, panels, and case studies
- Be the first to hear breaking news from live Reuters interviews

**Download the event brochure now for the full agenda, speaker line-up, and delegate list >>>**
